code:
import io
import string
import list

fn parse_line(_ s: String) -> List<Int>
  mut result: List<Int> = []
  let n = string.len(s)
  mut i = 0
  mut has_num = false
  mut sign = 1
  mut val = 0
  while i < n
    match string.byte_at(s, i)
    when Some(b)
      if b == 32 or b == 9 or b == 10 or b == 13
        if has_num
          result = list.push(result, sign * val)
          has_num = false
          sign = 1
          val = 0
        end
      else if b == 45 and not has_num
        sign = -1
        has_num = true
      else if b >= 48 and b <= 57
        val = val * 10 + (b - 48)
        has_num = true
      end
    when None
      ()
    end
    i = i + 1
  end
  if has_num
    result = list.push(result, sign * val)
  end
  result
end

fn insert_sorted_unique(_ xs: List<Int>, _ v: Int) -> List<Int>
  if list.contains(xs, v)
    return xs
  end
  mut result: List<Int> = []
  mut inserted = false
  let n = xs.len()
  mut i = 0
  while i < n
    match xs.get(i)
    when Some(x)
      if not inserted and v < x
        result = list.push(result, v)
        inserted = true
      end
      result = list.push(result, x)
    when None
      ()
    end
    i = i + 1
  end
  if not inserted
    result = list.push(result, v)
  end
  result
end

fn read_or_empty() -> String
  match io.read_line()
  when Some(s)
    s
  when None
    ""
  end
end

fn build_output(_ xs: List<Int>) -> String
  mut s = ""
  mut j = 0
  let n = xs.len()
  while j < n
    match xs.get(j)
    when Some(x)
      if j == 0
        s = "#{x}"
      else
        s = "#{s} #{x}"
      end
    when None
      ()
    end
    j = j + 1
  end
  s
end

fn main() -> Unit
  let l1 = read_or_empty()
  let l2 = read_or_empty()
  let a = parse_line(l1)
  let b = parse_line(l2)
  mut result: List<Int> = []
  let n = a.len()
  mut i = 0
  while i < n
    match a.get(i)
    when Some(x)
      if list.contains(b, x)
        result = insert_sorted_unique(result, x)
      end
    when None
      ()
    end
    i = i + 1
  end
  if result.len() == 0
    println("empty")
  else
    println(build_output(result))
  end
end
